de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.reference

Interface IProofReference<T>

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultProofReference

    public interface IProofReference<T>
    A proof reference which points to a source member used during proof. By default, instances are created via IProofReferencesAnalysts during reference computation via static methods of ProofReferenceUtil.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    ProofReferenceUtil, IProofReferencesAnalyst.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String ACCESS
      Read/Write access of a field like instance or class variables during proof.
      static String CALL_METHOD
      A method call which determines the possible implementations of a called method.
      static String INLINE_METHOD
      The proof step "methodBodyExpand" that inlines methods.
      static String USE_AXIOM
      Used axioms during proof.
      static String USE_CONTRACT
      The proof step "Use Operation Contract" which approximates a method call via its method contract and also the usage of dependency contracts.
      static String USE_INVARIANT
      Used invariants during proof.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addNodes(Collection<Node> nodes)
      Adds the given Nodes to the own Nodes.
      String getKind()
      Returns the reference kind which is a human readable String.
      LinkedHashSet<Node> getNodes()
      Returns the Nodes in which the reference was found.
      Proof getSource()
      Returns the source Proof.
      T getTarget()
      Returns the target source member.

    • Field Detail

      • CALL_METHOD

        static final String CALL_METHOD

        A method call which determines the possible implementations of a called method.

        References of this kind should provide an IProgramMethod as target (getTarget()).

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • INLINE_METHOD

        static final String INLINE_METHOD

        The proof step "methodBodyExpand" that inlines methods.

        References of this kind should provide an IProgramMethod as target (getTarget()).

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • USE_CONTRACT

        static final String USE_CONTRACT

        The proof step "Use Operation Contract" which approximates a method call via its method contract and also the usage of dependency contracts.

        References of this kind should provide a Contract as target (getTarget()).

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • ACCESS

        static final String ACCESS

        Read/Write access of a field like instance or class variables during proof.

        References of this kind should provide an IProgramVariable as target (getTarget()).

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • USE_INVARIANT

        static final String USE_INVARIANT

        Used invariants during proof.

        References of this kind should provide an ClassInvariant as target (getTarget()).

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • USE_AXIOM

        static final String USE_AXIOM

        Used axioms during proof.

        References of this kind should provide an ClassAxiom as target (getTarget()).

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • getKind

        String getKind()
        Returns the reference kind which is a human readable String.
        Returns:
        The reference kind as human readable String.

      • getNodes

        LinkedHashSet<Node> getNodes()
        Returns the Nodes in which the reference was found.
        Returns:
        The Nodes in which the reference was found.

      • addNodes

        void addNodes(Collection<Node> nodes)
        Adds the given Nodes to the own Nodes.
        Parameters:
        nodes - The Nodes to add.

      • getTarget

        T getTarget()
        Returns the target source member.
        Returns:
        The target source member.

      • getSource

        Proof getSource()
        Returns the source Proof.
        Returns:
        The source Proof.
